$DETAILBLENDFACTOR3.help: blend amount for detail texture on texture 3.

$DETAILBLENDFACTOR4.help: blend amount for detail texture on texture 4.

$NODIFFUSEBUMPLIGHTING.help: 0 == Use diffuse bump lighting, 1 = No diffuse bump lighting

$TEXTURE1_LUMSTART.help: texture 1 start component for lum smoothstep

$TEXTURE1_LUMEND.help: texture 1 end component for lum smoothstep

$TEXTURE2_BLENDSTART.help: texture 2 start component for blend smoothstep

$TEXTURE2_BLENDEND.help: texture 2 end component for blend smoothstep

$TEXTURE2_LUMSTART.help: texture 2 start component for lum smoothstep

$TEXTURE3_BLENDSTART.help: texture 3 start component for blend smoothstep

$TEXTURE3_BLENDEND.help: texture 3 end component for blend smoothstep

$TEXTURE3_LUMSTART.help: texture 3 start component for lum smoothstep

$TEXTURE4_LUMSTART.help: texture 4 start component for lum smoothstep

$TEXTURE4_LUMEND.help: texture 4 end component for lum smoothstep

$TEXTURE4_BUMPBLENDFACTOR.help: texture 4 how much the bump blends in

$SSBUMP.help: whether or not to use alternate bumpmap format with height

$BUMP_FORCE_ON.help: force bump-mapping on, even for low-end machines

$SEAMLESS_SCALE.help: Scale factor for 'seamless' texture mapping. 0 means to use ordinary mapping

$LUMBLENDFACTOR2.help: blend factor between the luminance of layer 2 and layer one

$LUMBLENDFACTOR3.help: blend factor between the luminance of layer 3 and layers below it

$LUMBLENDFACTOR4.help: blend factor between the luminance of layer 4 and layers below it

$ENVMAPANISOTROPY.help: Enable anisotropic cubemap lookups for macroscopically rough/microscopically smooth surfaces, like wet asphalt

$ENVMAPANISOTROPYSCALE.help: Scale anisotropy amount for cubemap lookups

$ENVMAPLIGHTSCALE.help: How much the lightmap effects environment map reflection, 0.0 is off, 1.0 will allow complete blackness of the environment map if the lightmap is black

$ENVMAPLIGHTSCALEMINMAX.help: Thresholds for the lightmap envmap effect.  Setting the min higher increases the minimum light amount at which the envmap gets nerfed to nothing.

$DETAIL1SCALE.help: scale detail1 as multiplier of base UVs

$DETAIL2SCALE.help: scale detail1 as multiplier of base UVs

$TANGENTTOPACITYRANGES.help: enables view-based opacity falloff based on tangent t direction, great for cylinders, includes last term for scaling backface opacity

$TANGENTSOPACITYRANGES.help: enables view-based opacity falloff based on tangent s direction, great for cylinders, includes last term for scaling backface opacity

$FRESNELOPACITYRANGES.help: enables fresnel-based opacity falloff, includes last term for scaling backface opacity

$NEEDSTANGENTT.help: don't need to set this explicitly, it gets set when tangenttopacityranges is defined

$NEEDSTANGENTS.help: don't need to set this explicitly, it gets set when tangentSopacityranges is defined

$NEEDSNORMALS.help: don't need to set this explicitly, it gets set when fresnelopacityranges is defined

$DEPTHBLENDSCALE.help: Amplify or reduce DEPTHBLEND fading. Lower values make harder edges.

$REFRACT.help: Enable refraction when flowmap is specified

$REFRACTEFFECTSCALE.help: Apply this boost to the rgb channel of the fizzler effects when refract is enabled

$NOSRGB.help: do not operate in srgb space

$srgbtint.help: tint value to be applied when running on new-style srgb parts

$DEPTHBLENDSCALE.help: Amplify or reduce DEPTHBLEND fading. Lower values make harder edges.

$INVERSEDEPTHBLEND.help: calculate 1-depthblendalpha so that sprites appear when they are near geometry

$ORIENTATION.help: 0 = always face camera, 1 = rotate around z, 2= parallel to ground 3=use normal 4=face camera POS

$AIMATCAMERA.help: Aim at camera using orientation type 1

$ADDBASETEXTURE2.help: amount to blend second texture into frame by

$OVERBRIGHTFACTOR.help: overbright factor for texture. For HDR effects.

$SEQUENCE_BLEND_MODE.help: defines the blend mode between the images un dual sequence particles. 0 = avg, 1=alpha from first, rgb from 2nd, 2= first over second

$MAXLUMFRAMEBLEND1.help: instead of blending between animation frames for the first sequence, select pixels based upon max luminance

$MAXLUMFRAMEBLEND2.help: instead of blending between animation frames for the 2nd sequence, select pixels based upon max luminance

$RAMPTEXTURE.help: if specified, then the red value of the image is used to index this ramp to produce the output color

$ZOOMANIMATESEQ2.help: amount to gradually zoom between frames on the second sequence. 2.0 will double the size of a frame over its lifetime.

$EXTRACTGREENALPHA.help: grayscale data sitting in green/alpha channels

$ADDSELF.help: amount of base texture to additively blend in

$BLENDFRAMES.help: whether or not to smoothly blend between animated frames

$MINSIZE.help: minimum screen fractional size of particle

$STARTFADESIZE.help: screen fractional size to start fading particle out

$ENDFADESIZE.help: screen fractional size to finish fading particle out

$MAXSIZE.help: maximum screen fractional size of particle

$USEINSTANCING.help: whether to use GPU vertex instancing (submit 1 vert per particle quad)

$MAXDISTANCE.help: maximum distance to draw particles at

$FARFADEINTERVAL.help: interval over which to fade out far away particles

$SHADERSRGBREAD360.help: Simulate srgb read in shader code

$ORIENTATIONMATRIX.help: Matrix used to orient in orientation mode #2

$MOD2X.help: whether or not to multiply the result of the pixel shader * 2 against the framebuffer

$ALPHATRAILFADE.help: Amount to scale alpha by between start and end of trail/rope

$RADIUSTRAILFADE.help: Amount to scale radis by between start and end of trail/rope

$SHADOWDEPTH.help: writing to a shadow depth buffer

$CROPFACTOR.help: writing to a shadow depth buffer

$VERTEXCOLORLERP.help: Enable computing vertex color by interpolating two color based on vertex r color channel

$VERTEXFOGAMOUNT.help: Amount of vertex fog to apply

$DISTANCEALPHA.help: Use distance-coded alpha generated from hi-res texture by vtex.

$SOFTEDGES.help: Enable soft edges to distance coded textures.

$EDGESOFTNESSSTART.help: Start value for soft edges for distancealpha.

$EDGESOFTNESSEND.help: End value for soft edges for distancealpha.

$OUTLINE.help: Enable outline for distance coded textures.

$OUTLINECOLOR.help: color of outline for distance coded images.

$MULOUTPUTBYALPHA.help: Multiply output RGB by output alpha to avoid precision problems

$INTENSITY.help: Multiply output RGB by intensity factor

$srgbtint.help: tint value to be applied when running on new-style srgb parts

$ILLUMFACTOR.help: Amount to darken or brighten the teeth

$FORWARD.help: Forward direction vector for teeth lighting

$ENTITYORIGIN.help: center if the model in world space

$srgbtint.help: tint value to be applied when running on new-style srgb parts

$ALBEDO.help: albedo (Base texture with no baked lighting)

$PHONGEXPONENT.help: Phong exponent for local specular lights

$PHONGTINT.help: Phong tint for local specular lights

$PHONGALBEDOTINT.help: Apply tint by albedo (controlled by spec exponent texture

$LIGHTWARPTEXTURE.help: 1D ramp texture for tinting scalar diffuse term

$PHONGBOOST.help: Phong overbrightening factor (specular mask channel should be authored to account for this)

$DETAILBLENDMODE.help: mode for combining detail texture with base. 0=normal, 1= additive, 2=alpha blend detail over base, 3=crossfade

$DECALBLENDMODE.help: mode for combining decal texture with base. 0=normal(decal*srca + base*(1-srca), 1= mod, 2=mod2x, 3=additive

$DISTANCEALPHA.help: Use distance-coded alpha generated from hi-res texture by vtex.

$DISTANCEALPHAFROMDETAIL.help: Take the distance-coded alpha mask from the detail texture.

$SOFTEDGES.help: Enable soft edges to distance coded textures.

$SCALEEDGESOFTNESSBASEDONSCREENRES.help: Scale the size of the soft edges based upon resolution. 1024x768 = nominal.

$EDGESOFTNESSSTART.help: Start value for soft edges for distancealpha.

$EDGESOFTNESSEND.help: End value for soft edges for distancealpha.

$GLOW.help: Enable glow/shadow for distance coded textures.

$GLOWCOLOR.help: color of outter glow for distance coded line art.

$GLOWALPHA.help: Base glow alpha amount for glows/shadows with distance alpha.

$GLOWX.help: texture offset x for glow mask.

$GLOWY.help: texture offset y for glow mask.

$OUTLINE.help: Enable outline for distance coded textures.

$OUTLINECOLOR.help: color of outline for distance coded images.

$SCALEOUTLINESOFTNESSBASEDONSCREENRES.help: Scale the size of the soft part of the outline based upon resolution. 1024x768 = nominal.

$GAMMACOLORREAD.help: Disables SRGB conversion of color texture read.

$LINEARWRITE.help: Disables SRGB conversion of shader results.

$RECEIVEFLASHLIGHT.help: Forces this material to receive flashlights.

$SINGLEPASSFLASHLIGHT.help: Flags this material as possibly being run through single pass flashlight code

$SHADERSRGBREAD360.help: Simulate srgb read in shader code

$TINTMASKTEXTURE.help: Separate tint mask texture (as opposed to using basetexture alpha)

$basetexture.help: Base Texture with lighting built in

$srgbtint.help: tint value to be applied when running on new-style srgb parts

$CLOAKPASSENABLED.help: Enables cloak render in a second pass

$basetexture.help: Base Texture with lighting built in

$srgbtint.help: tint value to be applied when running on new-style srgb parts

$ALBEDO.help: albedo (Base texture with no baked lighting)

$SELFILLUM_ENVMAPMASK_ALPHA.help: defines that self illum value comes from env map mask alpha

$SELFILLUMFRESNELMINMAXEXP.help: Self illum fresnel min, max, exp

$PHONGEXPONENT.help: Phong exponent for local specular lights

$PHONGTINT.help: Phong tint for local specular lights

$PHONGALBEDOTINT.help: Apply tint by albedo (controlled by spec exponent texture

$LIGHTWARPTEXTURE.help: 1D ramp texture for tinting scalar diffuse term

$PHONGBOOST.help: Phong overbrightening factor (specular mask channel should be authored to account for this)

$PHONGALBEDOBOOST.help: Phong albedo overbrightening factor (specular mask channel should be authored to account for this)

$FORCEPHONG.help: forces Phong lighting, even at low GPU levels (Phong must already be enabled)

$BASEMAPALPHAPHONGMASK.help: indicates that there is no normal map and that the phong mask is in base alpha

$INVERTPHONGMASK.help: invert the phong mask (0=full phong, 1=no phong)

$ENVMAPFRESNEL.help: Degree to which Fresnel should be applied to env map

$SELFILLUMMASK.help: If we bind a texture here, it overrides base alpha (if any) for self illum

$BASEMAPLUMINANCEPHONGMASK.help: indicates that the base luminance should be used to mask phong

$DETAILBLENDMODE.help: mode for combining detail texture with base. 0=normal, 1= additive, 2=alpha blend detail over base, 3=crossfade

$RIMMASK.help: Indicates whether or not to use alpha channel of exponent texture to mask the rim term

$SEAMLESS_BASE.help: whether to apply seamless mapping to the base texture. requires a smooth model.

$SEAMLESS_DETAIL.help: where to apply seamless mapping to the detail texture.

$SEAMLESS_SCALE.help: the scale for the seamless mapping. # of repetions of texture per inch.

$CLOAKPASSENABLED.help: Enables cloak render in a second pass

$FLESHBORDERNOISESCALE.help: Flesh Noise UV scalar for border

$LINEARWRITE.help: Disables SRGB conversion of shader results.

$SHADERSRGBREAD360.help: Simulate srgb read in shader code

$AMBIENTOCCLUSION.help: Amount of screen space ambient occlusion to use (0..1 range)

$BLENDTINTBYBASEALPHA.help: Use the base alpha to blend in the $color modulation

$DESATURATEWITHBASEALPHA.help: Use the base alpha to desaturate the base texture.  Set to non-zero to enable, value gets multiplied into the alpha channel before desaturating.

$ENVMAPFRESNELMINMAXEXP.help: Min/max fresnel range and exponent for vertexlitgeneric

$DECALBLENDMODE.help: mode for combining decal texture with base. 0=normal(decal*srca + base*(1-srca), 1= mod, 2=mod2x, 3=additive

$ENVMAPLIGHTSCALE.help: How much the lightmap effects environment map reflection, 0.0 is off, 1.0 will allow complete blackness of the environment map if the lightmap is black

$ENVMAPLIGHTSCALEMINMAX.help: Thresholds for the lightmap envmap effect.  Setting the min higher increases the minimum light amount at which the envmap gets nerfed to nothing.

$TINTMASKTEXTURE.help: Separate tint mask texture (as opposed to using basetexture alpha)

$ENVMAPMASKINTINTMASKTEXTURE.help: Envmap mask is stored in ting mask texture (instead of normal map alpha)

$LAYEREDDAMAGEBLEND.help: When enabled, blend mode 4 turns into a special blend mode for layering damage, with the detail texture being the lower strata with no spec or env, and the base texture being the upper strata which casts a drop shadow.  The blend is a thresholded value based on the detail alpha, allowing for what looks like chipped off paint or cracks.

$basetexture.help: Base Texture with lighting built in

$srgbtint.help: tint value to be applied when running on new-style srgb parts

$basetexture.help: Base Texture with lighting built in

$srgbtint.help: tint value to be applied when running on new-style srgb parts

$basetexture.help: Base Texture with lighting built in

$srgbtint.help: tint value to be applied when running on new-style srgb parts

$CHEAPWATERSTARTDISTANCE.help: This is the distance from the eye in inches that the shader should start transitioning to a cheaper water shader.

$CHEAPWATERENDDISTANCE.help: This is the distance from the eye in inches that the shader should finish transitioning to a cheaper water shader.

$basetexture.help: Base Texture with lighting built in

$srgbtint.help: tint value to be applied when running on new-style srgb parts

$srgbtint.help: tint value to be applied when running on new-style srgb parts

$basetexture.help: iris texture

$srgbtint.help: tint value to be applied when running on new-style srgb parts

$ALBEDO.help: albedo (Base texture with no baked lighting)

$DETAIL_ALPHA_MASK_BASE_TEXTURE.help: If this is 1, then when detail alpha=0, no base texture is blended and when detail alpha=1, you get detail*base*lightmap

$NODIFFUSEBUMPLIGHTING.help: 0 == Use diffuse bump lighting, 1 = No diffuse bump lighting

$SEAMLESS_SCALE.help: Scale factor for 'seamless' texture mapping. 0 means to use ordinary mapping

$basetexture.help: Base Texture with lighting built in

$srgbtint.help: tint value to be applied when running on new-style srgb parts

$DETAILBLENDMODE.help: mode for combining detail texture with base. 0=normal, 1= additive, 2=alpha blend detail over base, 3=crossfade

$NODIFFUSEBUMPLIGHTING.help: 0 == Use diffuse bump lighting, 1 = No diffuse bump lighting

$BLENDMODULATETEXTURE.help: texture to use r/g channels for blend range for

$SSBUMP.help: whether or not to use alternate bumpmap format with height

$BUMP_FORCE_ON.help: force bump-mapping on, even for low-end machines

$SEAMLESS_SCALE.help: Scale factor for 'seamless' texture mapping. 0 means to use ordinary mapping

$ENVMAPANISOTROPY.help: Enable anisotropic cubemap lookups for macroscopically rough/microscopically smooth surfaces, like wet asphalt

$ENVMAPANISOTROPYSCALE.help: Scale anisotropy amount for cubemap lookups

$ENVMAPLIGHTSCALE.help: How much the lightmap effects environment map reflection, 0.0 is off, 1.0 will allow complete blackness of the environment map if the lightmap is black

$ENVMAPLIGHTSCALEMINMAX.help: Thresholds for the lightmap envmap effect.  Setting the min higher increases the minimum light amount at which the envmap gets nerfed to nothing.

$PHONGEXPONENT.help: Phong exponent for Key (CSM Casting) Light - on $basetexture

$PHONGEXPONENT2.help: Phong exponent for Key (CSM Casting) Light - on $basetexture2

$PHONGMASKCONTRASTBRIGHTNESS.help: Contrast and Brightness for Phong Mask generation using $basetexture

$PHONGMASKCONTRASTBRIGHTNESS2.help: Contrast and Brightness for Phong Mask generation using $basetexture2

$PHONGAMOUNT.help: Phong tint and amount on $basetexture > 1 to scale phong, .a is diffuseComponent multiplier, 0=> remove diffuse, >1 => overbright diffuse

$PHONGAMOUNT2.help: Phong tint and amount on $basetexture2 > 1 to scale phong, .a is diffuseComponent multiplier, 0=> remove diffuse, >1 => overbright diffuse

$DROPSHADOWHIGHLIGHTSCALE.help: Highlight size opposite drop shadow effect

$ENVMAPORIGIN.help: The world space position of the env_cubemap being corrected

$basetexture.help: Base Texture with lighting built in

$srgbtint.help: tint value to be applied when running on new-style srgb parts
